questionHtml: State one technological improvement, other than enzymatic digestion, that led to the falsification of previous models to determine the current model of membrane structure.
markschemeHtml:
a. scanning electronmicrography / SEM ✔

b. freeze fracture/etching ✔

c. X-ray diffraction
OR
crystallography ✔

d. fluorescent antibody / marker tagging ✔

Do not accept electron microscope

Accept description of process

meta.title: State one technological improvement, other than enzymatic digestion, that led to the falsification of previous models to determine the current model of membrane structure.
breadcrumbLabels: B2.1.10. Fluid mosaic model of membrane structure
